title: Hardened-core capability-redesign adversarial protocol vectors
description: Protocol-level negative vectors for instruction typing, federation quarantine, capability signatures, HLC skew, and peer-token replay.

vectors.description: A caller with ordinary read/write permission cannot assert an instruction-typed fact.
A federation-inbound instruction-typed fact is stored pending in the configured quarantine garden.
Mutating a signed capability token invalidates its Ed25519 signature.
Federation ingest rejects a remote HLC wall time outside the configured future-skew bound.
Reusing a federation peer token nonce is rejected on the second request.
